ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sportsbooks" (
  "sportsbook_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sportsbook */,
  "sportsbook_name" TEXT /* Name of the sportsbook */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the sportsbook's website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the sportsbook */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the sportsbook was founded */,
  "legal_status" TEXT /* Legal status of the sportsbook (e.g., licensed, unlicensed) */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* Location of the sportsbook's headquarters */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the sportsbook */,
  "customer_support_email" TEXT /* Email for customer support */,
  "customer_support_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for customer support */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sportsbook is currently active */,
  "number_of_customers" INTEGER /* Number of active customers */,
  "legal_jurisdictions" TEXT /* List of countries where the sportsbook is legally allowed to operate */,
  "payment_methods" TEXT /* List of accepted payment methods */,
  "bonus_offers" TEXT /* Description of any bonus offers available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sportsbook_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Primary currency used in the country */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken in the country */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gambling_laws" TEXT /* Summary of gambling laws in the country */,
  "popular_sports" TEXT /* List of popular sports in the country */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "odds" (
  "odds_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each odds entry */,
  "sportsbook_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sportsbook offering the odds */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the odds are applicable */,
  "odds_value" REAL /* Value of the odds */,
  "odds_date" TEXT /* Date when the odds were recorded */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport associated with the odds */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event associated with the odds */,
  "odds_type" TEXT /* Type of odds (e.g., moneyline, point spread, over/under) */,
  "bookmaker_margin" REAL /* Bookmaker's margin for the odds */,
  "bet_type" TEXT /* Type of bet (e.g., pre-match, live) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the odds were updated */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the odds (e.g., from machine learning models) */,
  "arbitrage_opportunity" INTEGER /* Indicates if there is an arbitrage opportunity */,
  "arbitrage_profit" REAL /* Potential profit from arbitrage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("odds_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_odds_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_odds_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_odds_sportsbook_id FOREIGN KEY ("sportsbook_id") REFERENCES sportsbooks ("sportsbook_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_odds_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  "worldwide_popularity" INTEGER /* Global popularity score */,
  "average_ticket_price" REAL /* Average ticket price for live events */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the sport */,
  "major_leagues" TEXT /* List of major leagues in the sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport associated with the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., league match, tournament) */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Home team name */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Away team name */,
  "final_score" TEXT /* Final score of the event */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the event */,
  "venue_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "broadcast_channels" TEXT /* List of channels broadcasting the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Last time the user was active */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level for the user */,
  "assigned_projects" TEXT /* List of projects the user is assigned to */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Last time the user changed their password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the odds data */,
  "odds_id" INTEGER /* ID of the odds data accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the odds data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Operating system of the device */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_odds_id FOREIGN KEY ("odds_id") REFERENCES odds ("odds_id")
)
